name: 11L Backout + Int6 + SWA
author: sheeki03
blurb: Learned residual subtraction (Backout Connection) from mid-network hidden state. Backout removes redundant mid-layer information, improving val_bpb by 0.0071 over PR #198 baseline with zero additional matrix parameters (one learned scalar). 11 layers, 3x MLP, int6 mixed quant + zstd, SmearGate, BigramHash(4096), SWA, FA3, sliding eval stride=64.
known_issues: Artifact is 16,170,051 bytes (170KB over 16MB cap). Fixable with INT5_MLP=1 which typically saves 1-2MB.
